verse_text: Coming out, He went to the Mount of Olives, as He was accustomed, and His disciples also followed Him. And He said to them, 'It is enough.'

links.context: Cries and tears is likely a reference to our Lord's agonizing prayer in the Garden of Gethsemane ([[MAT.26:36]]-46; [[MRK.14:32]]-42; [[LUK.22:39]]-46).
